_comment: Distributed deployment example. Copy relevant sections to appsettings.json or use environment variable overrides.

Client._comment: Point all nodes (API, Reader, Scheduler) to the shared load-balancer address.

Database._comment: Use MySQL or MSSQL so all nodes share the same persistent database. SQLite :memory: is single-node only.

Scheduler._comment: Scheduler can run on every API node. Duplicate execution is prevented by the ClaimScheduleTick distributed lock.

Notify._comment: Notify/Listener binds a local UDP/TCP port. Deploy on a dedicated node and disable on all other API nodes.

Listener._comment: Same as Notify: run on a dedicated node, disable on API-only nodes.

Reader._comment: Each Reader node must have a unique Id (GUID). Threads controls parallel meter reads per node.
Reader.Name: Reader-Node-1
